The '''Coruscant Insurrection''', sometimes referred to as the '''Invasion of Coruscant''', was a battle in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that took place in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Prelude==
[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and one of his [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]], [[Trenox]], infiltrated [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with an army of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in a mission to destroy the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]] in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].

==The battle==
The invasion began during [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] investigation on [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|C-B3 cortosis battle droids]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Anakin was alerted to the conflict by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and he promptly flew back to Coruscant to assist the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] against the sudden attack. He aided the Republic forces in defending the High City of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Many [[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] were utilized as [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] during the invasion, terrorizing the civilians on the platforms and walkways while groups of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] attacked the interior of the upper level buildings. During the battle, Anakin met one of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]], [[Trenox]], and pursued him to the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]]. They met at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] where Trenox knocked Anakin back before escaping to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. While in the Underlevels, Anakin met the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Vandalor]] for the very first time. When asked for the whereabouts of Trenox, Vandalor informed him that he was probably busy attacking the Jedi Archives, before he walked away.

With this information in mind, Anakin headed back to the Jedi Temple to find that the Separatist had indeed infiltrated the Temple. He proceeded to the Jedi Archives and confronted and killed Trenox, but was delayed long enough for Dooku to steal at least one [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]] and escape. [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was wounded during the battle. Some of the Jedi, notably [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]], had trouble fighting the lightsaber-resistant cortosis battle droids that were deployed during the battle. Anakin learned that these cortosis droids could be easily sliced in half by slashing down upon the gap between the droids' breastplates.

===Aftermath===
A trooper named [[Rom Mohc]] fought [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in personal combat and was later touted as a hero all over the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]]. Later, during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], this would inspire Mohc to lead the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark trooper]] project. This battle, coupled with the [[Assault on Sarapin|Sarapin blackout]], left Coruscant's citizens no longer feeling safe from the war's ravages.
